'''Mazong''' was the [[Highborn]] of the [[Yiwa]] clan of the [[Alwari]] tribes of [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] in the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist]] era, before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He had red-brown eyes, wore [[shanh]] skins, and quickly acquired a great respect for the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], who in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] had come to [[Border dispute on Ansion/Legends|aid]] his planet's [[Unity of Community|leadership]] and nomadic peoples to resist secession and stay within the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

Mazong challenged his Jedi guests to demonstrate via individual performances at the clan's evening feast held in their honor that they, in fact, possessed ''souls, ''an "inner essence, unlike the representatives of the great but soulless Senate."<ref name="The Approaching Storm">''[[The Approaching Storm]]''</ref> In this the Jedi were successful, earning Mazong's high respect and critical help in their quest to locate the ruling [[Borokii]] [[overclan]].
